description: From the manufacturer Lyyt | Rechargeable LED Hanging Lantern With 4 Lighting Modes Elevate your outdoor experiences with our Rechargeable LED Lantern, designed to bring versatility and style to your your adventures. Featuring four lighting modes—COB Warm, LED Warm, Cool, and combined—it offers flexibility for various settings and preferences. Whether you're enjoying a serene evening at a campsite or enhancing your backyard ambiance, this lantern delivers the perfect lighting solution. Powered by a rechargeable battery and equipped with USB-C charging capability, this ensures you're never without light. Its lightweight design, weighing only 140g, makes it effortlessly portable for camping, hiking, or any outdoor excursion. The lantern's compact dimensions (115x115x90mm) maximize space efficiency without compromising on brightness. Crafted with durability in mind, a 20cm cord with hook, allows you to hang it securely wherever light's needed. Its sleek design not only enhances functionality but also adds a decorative element to your outdoor setup. Whether you seek a warm, inviting glow or a crisp, clear light, this Rechargeable LED Lantern is your essential companion for illuminating and enhancing your outdoor adventures. PRODUCT FEATURES: Four Lighting Modes | COB Warm, LED Warm, Cool, and combined USB-C Rechargeable | Convenient 1200mAh battery Lightweight | Only 140g, easy to carry Compact Design | Dimensions of 115x115x90mm Versatile Hanging | 20cm cord with hook for easy placement Not Weatherproof | For sheltered or dry weather use only SPECIFICATION: Weight - 140g Dimensions - 115x115x90mm Batteries - 1200mAh rechargeable
